title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at NoBroker

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at NoBroker
jsonLd.description:
NoBroker has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About NoBroker:
NoBroker is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NoBroker!
